publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Taʾammǝra Māryām
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Hildephonsus (Dexius) of Toledo
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the preservation of the Church of the Virgin in ʾAṯrīb
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of ʾabbā Mārdāri who was visited and blessed by 12 angels
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a man without virtue who loved Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of St Paul who sees the glory of the Virgin Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Bǝḥor, a disciple of ʾAmmoni, who sees the glory of the Virgin Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of St Gregory the Illuminator who sees the glory of the Virgin Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Sāulā, wife of St George the Younger
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the Convent of Māḫǝw
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of two sons of the magician ʾAbrāsi pardoned thanks to the prayer to St. Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a Roman officer whose son was healed in Bethlehem
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a one-eyed woman healed by Mary in Bethlehem
Miracle of Mary: Apparition of Mary and St Michael to the patriarch Timotewos at the Convent of ʾAbbā Pachomius
Miracle of Mary: Story of an apparition of Jesus at the Convent of Qʷǝsqʷām to a monk called Anton (Antoine)
Miracle of Mary: Continuation of the vision of Anthony of Dabra Qʷǝsqʷām
Miracle of Mary: St Mary anoints sick animals and heals them at Dabra Qʷǝsqʷām
Miracle of Mary: Anthony, the monk of Dabra Qʷǝsqʷām, asks about the anointing of the animals
Miracle of Mary: The blessing given to the animals at Dabra Qʷǝsqʷām by the anointing of St Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the thirsty dog whom the Virgin gave water
Miracle of Mary: Vision of Timothy of Alexandria: The life of St Mary to the birth of Christ
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the Apparition of the Virgin to John Chrysostom
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the transmigration of the Virgin, Jews burned in Bethlehem
Miracle of Mary: The Holy Spirit recounts the salvific events that have occurred on Sunday
Miracle of Mary: Narration of St Basil on the apparition of the Virgin
Miracle of Mary: St Basil finds the buried icon of St Mary
Miracle of Mary: St Mary tells St Basil to take two pillars from a pagan temple.
Miracle of Mary: St Mary sets up the pillars in the church and makes a miraculous spring flow out at their base
Miracle of Mary: Salome's hands are burned when she tries to verify St Mary's virginity, but they are healed when she takes the Christ Child into her arms
Miracle of Mary: St John the Evangelist sees Christ kissing St Mary's burial cloth
Miracle of Mary: St Mary s soul descends from heaven in a tent of light
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of ʾArsimā, whom Mary announced that two girls would be exempted from wordly desires
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the poor deacon Michael of Cairo, whose Muslim neighbour converted
Miracle of Mary: The Frenchman whose wife was unable to have children
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a European man who cut a piece of a miraculous picture in Ṣeʾednāyā
Miracle of Mary: The monks of Dabra Qalǝmon who were despoiled by Berbers
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a city destroyed by angels
Miracle of Mary: An Arab steals the scissors of the tailor of Dabra Qalǝmon
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Abraham, his wife Gerā and their blind daughter Elisabeth from Badramān
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a widow and her poor daughters Maria, Martha, and Yawāhit
Miracle of Mary: The Arab woman who entrusted her jewels to a Christian for safekeeping
Miracle of Mary: A man killed during the construction of the church of Dabra Qʷǝsqʷām is raised from the dead
Miracle of Mary: A child whom his mother had vowed to St Mary is rescued from drowning
Miracle of Mary: A column falls and breaks the leg of the son of an official when Muslims destroy a church of St Mary in Homs
Miracle of Mary: When Satan destroys the oven of a monastery, he is compelled to serve the monks for twelve years in punishment
Miracle of Mary: The Egyptian woman who lost a silver plate while bathing in a miraculous spring
Miracle of Mary: A thief is hanged upside down with the objects he stole from the church of St Mary in Sǝbkaḥad
Miracle of Mary: Homily on a miracle at the Convent of Mǝṭmāq
Miracle of the church built on the tomb of St Mary that will turn into a ship
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the blind priest John from the church of St Mercurius in Cairo
Miracle of Mary: Nǝkʷāl, the deacon from Margawkim, who spent his master's money on the poor
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary when at Bethlehem healed king Safron and drove out devils
Miracle of Mary: Brigands try to steal from a church of St Mary in Syria but are unable to bring what they have stolen out of the church
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a gardener of Manfaluṭ
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the blind child of a woman from Cairo healed by Mary
Miracle of Mary: How an Ishmaelite was converted when he saw oil and milk flowing from the breasts of a picture of the Virgin Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a woman who despite her mother-in-law adored a torn image of Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the two monks Sadaqā and Ṗeṭros (?) of the Convent of St Victor
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the monk ʾAbsādi of the Convent of ʾAbbā Sinoda
Miracle of Mary: The lamp of the Christian from Mǝneta Diyāqon that was blown out by the wind
Miracle of Mary: The wife of Joseph from Mǝneta Diyāqon, who had no male children
Miracle of Mary: Some Christians held captive by a Muslim are freed by an angel and are brought to Cyprus
Miracle of Mary: The priest from Cyprus who brought a particle of the Eucharist to a Jew
Miracle of Mary: A Muslim official demands tribute from the monks of Dabra Qʷǝsqʷām
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the old priest Qaṭīr at ʾƎlkǝsus (al-Khusus)
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a woman from Hartalom/Hartarom with broken legs
Miracle of Mary: The withered olive tree at the gate of the church in ʾƎndulǝs
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Tomās for the 21st Ṭǝrr
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a man of Cappadocia whose child was resuscitated after prayer
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the monk Isaac
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Ṗeṭros Bawārǝs who demanded to know the mystery of the trinity after building a Church to the Virgin
Miracle of Mary: Homily on a European man who stole the door of the cave in Bethlehem
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the young girl called Mary, from Dafrā
Miracle of Mary: The devout Muslim who became a Christian when St Mary appeared to him
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary enabled a man to slay a serpent from which he took a pearl
Miracle of Mary: St Basil and the rich man who refused to give him a tablet [sāledā] for an icon of St Mary.
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the leprous Bishop Mercurius
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the two brothers Tāg and Nazīb from Dalgā
Miracle of Mary: An Arab who contemns St Mary's icon at Dabra Qalamon is punished
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of three Arabs in Rīf and Salomon, abbot of Kalamon
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the priest Rizqallā from Cairo by whose prayer stolen belongings of pilgrims where given back
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the old woman from Sǝmbāt who gave the offering for St Mary to St George
Miracle of Mary: When the destruction of Dabra Mǝtmāq is reported in Ethiopia, the king orders the construction of a new monastery to take its place
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a statue of the Virgin built by Arcadius
Miracle of Mary: The Chalcedonian schism; the house of Nazareth is miraculously transported
Miracle of Mary: The infidel who stole the lumber from the church at Dabra Qʷǝsqʷām
Miracle of Mary: The monks of St Anthony celebrate Holy week at Dabra Qʷǝsqʷām
Miracle of Mary: Qommos Raphael from Dabra ʾƎnṣǝnā and the sacrament of confession
Miracle of Mary: The conversion of the Muslim, Rǝwḫ, who is renamed ʾƎnṭonǝs Ḥaddis
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of an Arab chief sparing Christian pilgrims
Miracle of Mary: ʾƎmma Yoḥannǝs and the Ethiopian monk who was on pilgrimage to Jerusalem
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a man cursed by another
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Theodosia, sister of Constantine, who found the cross in Jerusalem
Miracle of Mary: The wife of Mark, a priest from Mallāwī, is cured of her leprosy
Miracle of Mary: The composition of the Maṣḥafa ḥawi by Patriarch Gabriel ibn Tarīk
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary caused the spirits of Macarius and others to appear to the monks of Scete
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a poor monk whom Mary gave a garment
Miracle of Mary: A renegade monk who had become a Jew is hunted down by the troops of the king
Miracle of Mary: The Arab woman who suffered from an issue of blood for many years
Miracle of Mary: Yoḥannǝs finds a copy of the Acts of St Juliana and St Barbara that he had lost
Miracle of Mary: Emperor Zeno builds churches in Scete
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a thief merchant
Miracle of Mary: History of the Church of the Virgin in Zǝwilā
Miracle of Mary: How an image of the Virgin Mary wept for the sins of the world
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the two scribes who were brothers
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Mark, son of the king of Rome, Gabra ʾIyasus
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the patriarch Denis who asked from the Virgin to know the grave of Mark
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the monk Yoḥannǝs (?) of St Macarius who had visions of the Virgin
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the virgin whom a magistrate wanted to corrupt
Miracle of Mary: Bishop Hildephonsus sees the icon of St Mary sweating; she asks him to raise a girl from the dead
Miracle of Mary: Five Pains of the Virgin, Conversation of the Virgin and Jesus Christ; promise of salvation to those who recite the Paternoster and Ave Maria
Miracle of Mary: The woman whose baby daughter was carried off by a hyena
Miracle of Mary: The brother of Emperor Constantine who wanted to marry the empress while Constantine was on pilgrimage to Jerusalem
Miracle of Mary: St Mary appears to the brother of St Basil, St Gregory, bishop of "the Islands" (Nyssa)
Miracle of Mary: A monk, Abraham, drinks poisonous water while on a journey to visit the patriarch and dies, but is then raised from the dead
Miracle of Mary: ʾAmnut, the custodian of a church in Egypt, quarrels with his bishop
Miracle of Mary: The church of St Mary in Homs collapses in an earthquake
Miracle of Mary: Job, a pupil of Barsuma, falls into a well
Miracle of Mary: The priest from Nārdin who was accused because he kept a nun in his house
Miracle of Mary: The lamp before the icon of St Mary that the priest tipped over
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a woman who receives a child after having prayed to Mary at her apparition in Maṭāriya
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Martha, daughter of Fasilides, and her son Victor
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Eulogius, the stonemason of Scete, who used to give hospitality to strangers
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Yoḥannǝs Kǝmā who founded a Convent
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of George the Younger, who was delivered from prison
Miracle of Mary: ʾƎnṭāwos, a pagan from Qarāys, becomes a Christian after being struck by miraculous arrows
Miracle of Mary: A man who speaks blasphemously of St Mary has his hands and legs cut off
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a pagan woman of Rome who converted
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the resuscitation of the son of Tiberius, emperor of Rome
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of an image of Christ, painted by St John for Tiberius, revelations by Mary to St John
Miracle of Mary: A Muslim, Kaṭib, tries to extort money from the monks of St Anthony
Miracle of Mary: Homily of John Chrysostom on the visit of St Mary and her Son to John the Baptist
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Bifāmon of ʾAwsim who had an apparition of Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the transmigration of the Virgin, the Jews threaten to burn the Virgin's body and cut off the heads of the apostles
Miracle of Mary: A priest is warned by an angel not to rush when incensing the icon of St Mary
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary forgave Mary the Egyptian harlot
King's Parable: Part 1: Patriarch Abraham of Alexandria (d. 978), King al-Muizz, and the parable of the mustard seed (whole or opening)
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a woman from Ceasarea whom Mary helped to give birth
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the transmigration of the Virgin, Tāfonyā is sent to break the Virgin's bed and is saved by her
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of St Minas
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of ʾabbā Matewos who wounded his tongue to escape from being nominated patriarch
Miracle of Mary: Narration about John Chrysostom who defended Jesus' birth from the Virgin
Miracle of Mary: Narration about St Basil, on a woman who killed her sister
Miracle of Mary: St Mary rescues the ship in which Mār Barsumā is travelling
Miracle of Mary: St Mary appears to the disciples of Mār Barsumā in the form of a dove
Miracle of Mary: St Mary appears to Sts ʾAtrāsis and Yonā, virgins and martyrs
Miracle of Mary: St Mary appears to St Sarabamon, the future bishop of Nikiu and martyr
Miracle of Mary: St Mary appears to St Paphnutius
Miracle of Mary: St Mary appears to St Theodore the Anatolian
Miracle of Mary: St Mary appears to St Nicholas and gives him priestly vestments
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary and our Lord became sureties to a Jew for the debt owed to him by a certain merchant of Constantinople
Miracle of Mary: Synaxary entry for 16 Naḥase: The Apostles visit St Mary in heaven
Miracle of Mary: The inhabitants of Dāmot who would not observe the feast days of St Mary are punished by a storm that brings down a mighty tree
Miracle of Mary: The judgment of the court of Zarʿa Yāʿqob against the Stephanites
Miracle of Mary: Anne from Constantinople rises from the dead and relates her experiences
Miracle of Mary: The heir who planned to terminate his father's custom of a monthly feast in honor of St Mary
A wealthy man named Romanos in Alexandria steals another man's wife while the man is lost at sea
Book of Nagara Maryam??: OldP: Journey: The Virgin Mary asks for bread from a poor widow during the flight from Herod
Miracle of Mary: The Muslims who spent the night at the ruins of Dabra Mǝṭmāq
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a man of Cappadocia whose child was resuscitated after prayer
Book of Vision of Theophilus of Alexandria: Part 1 or 1.1: Patriarch Theophilus of Alexandria has a vision of the Virgin Mary telling him about the Holy Family's flight to Egypt
Miracle of Mary: The vision of Theophilus continued: Satan urges Herod to pursue the Holy Family
Miracle of Mary: The vision of Theophilus continued: The Holy Family returns from Egypt
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of an abbot who died after refusing the reading of the Miracles of Mary
Miracle of Mary: The wrath of St Mary against the prefect of a church who tried to stop the priests from making a procession while singing hymns to her
Miracle of Mary: The cupbearer of the king of France
Miracle of Mary: Homily on the founding of the Convent of Mǝṭmāq
Miracle of Mary: Homily on a potter from Syria
Miracle of Mary: The acts of St Paul in Wāriqon, as narrated by St Peter
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary kept alive miners buried in a fall of earth
Book of Ledata la-Maryam??: OldA: Part 01: Conception: The Virgin Mary is conceived and born (whole or opening)
Miracle of Mary: When she is three years old, St Mary is taken to the Temple
Miracle of Mary: St Mary is espoused to St Joseph
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the flight of Egypt; Miracle of the sycomore of Dabra Mǝṭmāq
Miracle of Mary: The king of Egypt asks St Mary to bless his land
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a woman and her family transformed into animals after having mistreated the Virgin
Miracle of Mary: How a bishop from St Peter's church in Rome stole holy oil and bought two pearls for Mary after having been rebuked
Miracle of Mary: The son of a Muslim ruler of Egypt blasphemes the icon of St Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the Roman prefect hindered of entering the Holy Sepulchre
Miracle of Mary: St Mary blesses Scete, which St Macarius choses for his monastery
Miracle of Mary: The story of Michael, the scribe who converted to Islam when he was beaten
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Qirās, a brigand of Galatia, saved by Mary from hanging
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the sinful deacon ʾAstirās whom Mary ordered to be buried in the believers' graveyard
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a fountain of water caused by Jesus in Māḫḍāb while returning to Palestine
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of ʿAbd al-Masīḥ and Markezā
Miracle of Mary: The persecution of the Christians during the patriarchate of Cosmas II
Miracle of Mary: A hermit in Jerusalem is saved from the temptations of Satan
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a French painter whose scaffold was overthrown by the devil
Miracle of Mary: The events that occurred during the captivity of Abbots Sāmuʾel of Dabra Qalǝmon and John of Scete
Miracle of Mary: St Mary raises Andrew, a disciple of Abba Sāmuʾel of Dabra Qalǝmon, from the dead.
Miracle of Mary: Vision of Timothy of Alexandria: The Holy Family arrives at Dabra Qʷǝsqʷām
Miracle of Mary: How a woman consigned to the Devil the son she conceived on Easter eve
Miracle of Mary: The vision of St John in the Apocalypse
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a pagan woman of Rome who converted
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary administered to certain monks a celestial compound to digest their food
Miracle of Mary: The story of the Muslim who lived near the churches of St Mark and St Shenute
Miracle of Mary: Vision of Timothy of Alexandria : The flight into Egypt
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the widow Martha and the monk Theodor of Ṣeʾednāyā
Miracle of Mary: The untrustworthy camel driver of Dabra Mǝṭmāq
Miracle of Mary: Yǝsḥaq, prior of Dabra Mǝṭmāq, who fled to Scete to escape the burden of his office
Miracle of Mary: Bishop Michael sends Deacon John to help the monks of Dabra Mǝṭmāq celebrate Passion Week
The story of the sorceress Ṭāludār, who was possessed by a demon
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the water reservoir at the Convent of Mǝṭmāq

supportDesc.foliation: Foliation in the upper right corner by the library.

layout.ab: Primary pricks and horizontal pricks are visible.
The upper line is written above the ruling, the lower line is written above the ruling.

decoDesc.summary: The three miniatures are executed in the . Inventaire des peintures datées du VXIIe au début du XIXe siècles: questions sur l'art gondarien (Éthiopie)Cahiers du CRA—Centre de recherches africainesClaireBosc-TiesséAnaïsWion19989215–242, pl.https://www.academia.edu/1439785/Inventaire_des_peintures_dat%C3%A9es_du_xviie_au_d%C3%A9but_du_xixe_si%C3%A8cles_questions_sur_lart_gond_arien_Ethiopie_236

decoNote.desc: A woodcut is pasted on , which has been subsequently coloured with coarse paints.

item.desc:
Copy of a deed of gift by Takla Hāymānot II to the priests of Däbrä Ṭǝbäb. The ʾabuna of the time was Yosāb II and the ʾǝč̣č̣age
Tasfā Giyorgis.
item.q: ውስተ፡ ቤተ፡ መቅደስ፡ ዘትሰመይ፡ ደብረ፡ ጥበብ፡ እንተ፡ ተሐንጸት፡ በጽንፈ፡ ጎንደር።

item.desc: Deed of gift by Takla Giyorgis I.
The note states that the manuscript belongs to the church of Madḫāne ʿĀlam.
The name of Tewoflos occurs repeatedly, showing that the manuscript was written during his reign.
The name of Zamikāʾel is written at the foot of .

binding.decoNote: In the original boards, lined with silk and covered with blind-tooled leather.

history.provenance: The manuscript had very probably belonged to a church in the Gondar area, from where it was taken by Tewodros and brought to Madḫāne ʿĀlam. It was then looted by the British Napier expedition in 1868.

bibl.title: Catalogue of the Ethiopic Manuscripts in the British Museum Acquired since the Year 1847

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: imported the miracles list from PEMM
